authors_text: Himashi Peiris,Munawar Hayat,Zhaolin Chen,Gary Egan,Mehrtash Harandi
title: Hybrid Window Attention Based Transformer Architecture for Brain Tumor Segmentation
title_zh: 用于脑肿瘤分割的基于混合窗口注意力的变压器架构
abstract: As intensities of MRI volumes are inconsistent across institutes, it is essential to extract universal features of multi-modal MRIs to precisely segment brain tumors. In this concept, we propose a volumetric vision transformer that follows two windowing strategies in attention for extracting fine features and local distributional smoothness (LDS) during model training inspired by virtual adversarial training (VAT) to make the model robust. We trained and evaluated network architecture on the FeTS Challenge 2022 dataset. Our performance on the online validation dataset is as follows: Dice Similarity Score of 81.71%, 91.38% and 85.40%; Hausdorff Distance (95%) of 14.81 mm, 3.93 mm, 11.18 mm for the enhancing tumor, whole tumor, and tumor core, respectively. Overall, the experimental results verify our method's effectiveness by yielding better performance in segmentation accuracy for each tumor sub-region. Our code implementation is publicly available : https://github.com/himashi92/vizviva_fets_2022
summary: As intensities of MRI volumes are inconsistent across institutes, it is essential to extract universal features of multi-modal MRIs to precisely segment brain tumors. In this concept, we propose a volumetric vision transformer that follows two windowing strategies in attention for extracting fine features and local distributional smoothness (LDS) during model training inspired by virtual adversarial training (VAT) to make the model robust. We trained and evaluated network architecture on the FeTS Challenge 2022 dataset. Our performance on the online validation dataset is as follows: Dice Similarity Score of 81.71%, 91.38% and 85.40%; Hausdorff Distance (95%) of 14.81 mm, 3.93 mm, 11.18 mm for the enhancing tumor, whole tumor, and tumor core, respectively. Overall, the experimental results verify our method's effectiveness by yielding better performance in segmentation accuracy for each tumor sub-region. Our code implementation is publicly available : https://github.com/himashi92/vizviva_fets_2022
abstract_zh: 由于各个机构的 MRI 体积强度不一致，因此必须提取多模态 MRI 的通用特征以精确分割脑肿瘤。在这个概念中，我们提出了一种体积视觉变换器，它遵循两种注意窗口策略，以在模型训练期间提取精细特征和局部分布平滑度（LDS），其灵感来自虚拟对抗训练（VAT），以使模型具有鲁棒性。我们在 FeTS Challenge 2022 数据集上训练和评估网络架构。我们在在线验证数据集上的表现如下：Dice 相似度得分为 81.71%、91.38% 和 85.40%；增强肿瘤、整个肿瘤和肿瘤核心的 Hausdorff 距离 (95%) 分别为 14.81 mm、3.93 mm、11.18 mm。总的来说，实验结果通过在每个肿瘤子区域的分割精度方面产生更好的性能来验证我们的方法的有效性。我们的代码实现是公开的：https://github.com/himashi92/vizviva_fets_2022

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于混合窗口注意力机制的Transformer架构，用于提高脑肿瘤分割的准确性。
AI.motivation: 由于不同机构的MRI影像强度存在差异，提取多模态MRI的通用特征对精确分割脑肿瘤至关重要。
AI.method: 设计了一种结合两种窗口策略的体素级视觉Transformer，通过注意力机制提取细粒度特征，并借鉴虚拟对抗训练思想增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在FeTS Challenge 2022数据集上，增强型肿瘤、全肿瘤和肿瘤核心的Dice分数分别为81.71%、91.38%和85.40%，95% Hausdorff距离分别为14.81mm、3.93mm和11.18mm。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果验证了该方法在各肿瘤子区域分割精度上的有效性，代码已开源。

Overall, the experimental results verify our method's effectiveness by yielding better performance in segmentation accuracy for each tumor sub-region. authors_text: Zhexin Zhang,Yeshuang Zhu,Zhengcong Fei,Jinchao Zhang,Jie Zhou
title: Selecting Stickers in Open-Domain Dialogue through Multitask Learning
title_zh: 通过多任务学习在开放域对话中选择贴纸
abstract: With the increasing popularity of online chatting, stickers are becoming important in our online communication. Selecting appropriate stickers in open-domain dialogue requires a comprehensive understanding of both dialogues and stickers, as well as the relationship between the two types of modalities. To tackle these challenges, we propose a multitask learning method comprised of three auxiliary tasks to enhance the understanding of dialogue history, emotion and semantic meaning of stickers. Extensive experiments conducted on a recent challenging dataset show that our model can better combine the multimodal information and achieve significantly higher accuracy over strong baselines. Ablation study further verifies the effectiveness of each auxiliary task. Our code is available at \url{https://github.com/nonstopfor/Sticker-Selection}
summary: With the increasing popularity of online chatting, stickers are becoming important in our online communication. Selecting appropriate stickers in open-domain dialogue requires a comprehensive understanding of both dialogues and stickers, as well as the relationship between the two types of modalities. To tackle these challenges, we propose a multitask learning method comprised of three auxiliary tasks to enhance the understanding of dialogue history, emotion and semantic meaning of stickers. Extensive experiments conducted on a recent challenging dataset show that our model can better combine the multimodal information and achieve significantly higher accuracy over strong baselines. Ablation study further verifies the effectiveness of each auxiliary task. Our code is available at \url{https://github.com/nonstopfor/Sticker-Selection}
abstract_zh: 随着在线聊天的日益普及，贴纸在我们的在线交流中变得越来越重要。在开放域对话中选择合适的贴纸需要对对话和贴纸以及两种模式之间的关系有全面的了解。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种由三个辅助任务组成的多任务学习方法，以增强对对话历史、情感和贴纸语义的理解。在最近具有挑战性的数据集上进行的大量实验表明，我们的模型可以更好地结合多模态信息，并在强基线上实现显着更高的准确性。消融研究进一步验证了每个辅助任务的有效性。我们的代码位于 \url{https://github.com/nonstopfor/Sticker-Selection}

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多任务学习方法，在开放领域对话中通过结合对话历史、情感和语义信息来提升贴纸选择的准确性。
AI.motivation: 随着在线聊天的普及，贴纸成为重要沟通方式，但现有方法难以全面理解对话与贴纸的多模态关系，需更有效的模型来提升选择准确性。
AI.method: 设计包含三个辅助任务的多任务学习框架，分别增强对话历史理解、贴纸情感分析和语义匹配，通过多模态信息融合实现贴纸选择。
AI.result: 在挑战性数据集上显著优于现有基线模型，消融实验证明各辅助任务有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 多任务学习能有效结合多模态信息提升贴纸选择性能，各辅助任务对最终结果有显著贡献。

title: Towards A Unified Policy Abstraction Theory and Representation Learning Approach in Markov Decision Processes
title_zh: 马尔可夫决策过程中统一的策略抽象理论和表示学习方法
abstract: Lying on the heart of intelligent decision-making systems, how policy is represented and optimized is a fundamental problem. The root challenge in this problem is the large scale and the high complexity of policy space, which exacerbates the difficulty of policy learning especially in real-world scenarios. Towards a desirable surrogate policy space, recently policy representation in a low-dimensional latent space has shown its potential in improving both the evaluation and optimization of policy. The key question involved in these studies is by what criterion we should abstract the policy space for desired compression and generalization. However, both the theory on policy abstraction and the methodology on policy representation learning are less studied in the literature. In this work, we make very first efforts to fill up the vacancy. First, we propose a unified policy abstraction theory, containing three types of policy abstraction associated to policy features at different levels. Then, we generalize them to three policy metrics that quantify the distance (i.e., similarity) of policies, for more convenient use in learning policy representation. Further, we propose a policy representation learning approach based on deep metric learning. For the empirical study, we investigate the efficacy of the proposed policy metrics and representations, in characterizing policy difference and conveying policy generalization respectively. Our experiments are conducted in both policy optimization and evaluation problems, containing trust-region policy optimization (TRPO), diversity-guided evolution strategy (DGES) and off-policy evaluation (OPE). Somewhat naturally, the experimental results indicate that there is no a universally optimal abstraction for all downstream learning problems; while the influence-irrelevance policy abstraction can be a generally preferred choice.
summary: Lying on the heart of intelligent decision-making systems, how policy is represented and optimized is a fundamental problem. The root challenge in this problem is the large scale and the high complexity of policy space, which exacerbates the difficulty of policy learning especially in real-world scenarios. Towards a desirable surrogate policy space, recently policy representation in a low-dimensional latent space has shown its potential in improving both the evaluation and optimization of policy. The key question involved in these studies is by what criterion we should abstract the policy space for desired compression and generalization. However, both the theory on policy abstraction and the methodology on policy representation learning are less studied in the literature. In this work, we make very first efforts to fill up the vacancy. First, we propose a unified policy abstraction theory, containing three types of policy abstraction associated to policy features at different levels. Then, we generalize them to three policy metrics that quantify the distance (i.e., similarity) of policies, for more convenient use in learning policy representation. Further, we propose a policy representation learning approach based on deep metric learning. For the empirical study, we investigate the efficacy of the proposed policy metrics and representations, in characterizing policy difference and conveying policy generalization respectively. Our experiments are conducted in both policy optimization and evaluation problems, containing trust-region policy optimization (TRPO), diversity-guided evolution strategy (DGES) and off-policy evaluation (OPE). Somewhat naturally, the experimental results indicate that there is no a universally optimal abstraction for all downstream learning problems; while the influence-irrelevance policy abstraction can be a generally preferred choice.
abstract_zh: 作为智能决策系统的核心，政策如何表达和优化是一个基本问题。这个问题的根本挑战是政策空间的大规模和高复杂性，这加剧了政策学习的难度，尤其是在现实场景中。为了获得理想的替代政策空间，最近低维潜在空间中的政策表示已显示出其在改善政策评估和优化方面的潜力。这些研究涉及的关键问题是我们应该按照什么标准抽象政策空间以实现所需的压缩和泛化。然而，政策抽象理论和政策表征学习方法论的文献研究较少。在这项工作中，我们首先努力填补空缺。首先，我们提出了一个统一的策略抽象理论，包含与不同级别的策略特征相关的三种类型的策略抽象。然后，我们将它们概括为三个量化策略距离（即相似性）的策略指标，以便更方便地用于学习策略表示。此外，我们提出了一种基于深度度量学习的策略表示学习方法。在实证研究中，我们研究了所提出的政策指标和表示形式分别在表征政策差异和传达政策概括方面的有效性。我们的实验针对策略优化和评估问题进行，包括信任域策略优化（TRPO）、多样性引导进化策略（DGES）和离策略评估（OPE）。很自然地，实验结果表明，对于所有下游学习问题，不存在普遍最优的抽象；而影响无关的策略抽象可能是通常的首选。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种马尔可夫决策过程中的统一策略抽象理论和表示学习方法，以解决策略空间高维复杂性带来的优化与评估难题。
AI.motivation: 策略表示与优化是智能决策系统的核心问题，但策略空间的高维性和复杂性导致实际场景中策略学习困难，亟需有效的抽象与表示方法。
AI.method: 提出包含三级策略抽象的统一理论，定义三种策略距离度量指标，并基于深度度量学习设计策略表示方法，通过TRPO、DGES和OPE实验验证效果。
AI.result: 实验表明不存在普适最优的抽象方法，但影响无关性策略抽象在多数下游任务中表现更优，能有效表征策略差异并提升泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 策略抽象需根据具体任务选择，影响无关性抽象作为通用方案具有优势，为后续研究提供了理论框架与实践方向。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种马尔可夫决策过程中的统一策略抽象理论和表示学习方法，以解决策略空间高维复杂性带来的优化与评估难题。
ai_content.motivation: 策略表示与优化是智能决策系统的核心问题，但策略空间的高维性和复杂性导致实际场景中策略学习困难，亟需有效的抽象与表示方法。
ai_content.method: 提出包含三级策略抽象的统一理论，定义三种策略距离度量指标，并基于深度度量学习设计策略表示方法，通过TRPO、DGES和OPE实验验证效果。
ai_content.result: 实验表明不存在普适最优的抽象方法，但影响无关性策略抽象在多数下游任务中表现更优，能有效表征策略差异并提升泛化能力。
ai_content.conclusion: 策略抽象需根据具体任务选择，影响无关性抽象作为通用方案具有优势，为后续研究提供了理论框架与实践方向。

search_text: Towards A Unified Policy Abstraction Theory and Representation Learning Approach in Markov Decision Processes 马尔可夫决策过程中统一的策略抽象理论和表示学习方法 Lying on the heart of intelligent decision-making systems, how policy is represented and optimized is a fundamental problem. The root challenge in this problem is the large scale and the high complexity of policy space, which exacerbates the difficulty of policy learning especially in real-world scenarios. Towards a desirable surrogate policy space, recently policy representation in a low-dimensional latent space has shown its potential in improving both the evaluation and optimization of policy. The key question involved in these studies is by what criterion we should abstract the policy space for desired compression and generalization. However, both the theory on policy abstraction and the methodology on policy representation learning are less studied in the literature. In this work, we make very first efforts to fill up the vacancy. First, we propose a unified policy abstraction theory, containing three types of policy abstraction associated to policy features at different levels. Then, we generalize them to three policy metrics that quantify the distance (i.e., similarity) of policies, for more convenient use in learning policy representation. Further, we propose a policy representation learning approach based on deep metric learning. For the empirical study, we investigate the efficacy of the proposed policy metrics and representations, in characterizing policy difference and conveying policy generalization respectively. Our experiments are conducted in both policy optimization and evaluation problems, containing trust-region policy optimization (TRPO), diversity-guided evolution strategy (DGES) and off-policy evaluation (OPE). Somewhat naturally, the experimental results indicate that there is no a universally optimal abstraction for all downstream learning problems; while the influence-irrelevance policy abstraction can be a generally preferred choice. 作为智能决策系统的核心，政策如何表达和优化是一个基本问题。这个问题的根本挑战是政策空间的大规模和高复杂性，这加剧了政策学习的难度，尤其是在现实场景中。为了获得理想的替代政策空间，最近低维潜在空间中的政策表示已显示出其在改善政策评估和优化方面的潜力。这些研究涉及的关键问题是我们应该按照什么标准抽象政策空间以实现所需的压缩和泛化。然而，政策抽象理论和政策表征学习方法论的文献研究较少。在这项工作中，我们首先努力填补空缺。首先，我们提出了一个统一的策略抽象理论，包含与不同级别的策略特征相关的三种类型的策略抽象。然后，我们将它们概括为三个量化策略距离（即相似性）的策略指标，以便更方便地用于学习策略表示。此外，我们提出了一种基于深度度量学习的策略表示学习方法。在实证研究中，我们研究了所提出的政策指标和表示形式分别在表征政策差异和传达政策概括方面的有效性。我们的实验针对策略优化和评估问题进行，包括信任域策略优化（TRPO）、多样性引导进化策略（DGES）和离策略评估（OPE）。很自然地，实验结果表明，对于所有下游学习问题，不存在普遍最优的抽象；而影响无关的策略抽象可能是通常的首选。 本文提出了一种马尔可夫决策过程中的统一策略抽象理论和表示学习方法，以解决策略空间高维复杂性带来的优化与评估难题。 Min Zhang,Hongyao Tang,Jianye Hao,Yan Zheng cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Lin Chen,Zhixiang Wei,Xin Jin,Huaian Chen,Miao Zheng,Kai Chen,Yi Jin
title: Deliberated Domain Bridging for Domain Adaptive Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于域自适应语义分割的故意域桥接
abstract: In unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA), directly adapting from the source to the target domain usually suffers significant discrepancies and leads to insufficient alignment. Thus, many UDA works attempt to vanish the domain gap gradually and softly via various intermediate spaces, dubbed domain bridging (DB). However, for dense prediction tasks such as domain adaptive semantic segmentation (DASS), existing solutions have mostly relied on rough style transfer and how to elegantly bridge domains is still under-explored. In this work, we resort to data mixing to establish a deliberated domain bridging (DDB) for DASS, through which the joint distributions of source and target domains are aligned and interacted with each in the intermediate space. At the heart of DDB lies a dual-path domain bridging step for generating two intermediate domains using the coarse-wise and the fine-wise data mixing techniques, alongside a cross-path knowledge distillation step for taking two complementary models trained on generated intermediate samples as 'teachers' to develop a superior 'student' in a multi-teacher distillation manner. These two optimization steps work in an alternating way and reinforce each other to give rise to DDB with strong adaptation power. Extensive experiments on adaptive segmentation tasks with different settings demonstrate that our DDB significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Code is available at https://github.com/xiaoachen98/DDB.git.
summary: In unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA), directly adapting from the source to the target domain usually suffers significant discrepancies and leads to insufficient alignment. Thus, many UDA works attempt to vanish the domain gap gradually and softly via various intermediate spaces, dubbed domain bridging (DB). However, for dense prediction tasks such as domain adaptive semantic segmentation (DASS), existing solutions have mostly relied on rough style transfer and how to elegantly bridge domains is still under-explored. In this work, we resort to data mixing to establish a deliberated domain bridging (DDB) for DASS, through which the joint distributions of source and target domains are aligned and interacted with each in the intermediate space. At the heart of DDB lies a dual-path domain bridging step for generating two intermediate domains using the coarse-wise and the fine-wise data mixing techniques, alongside a cross-path knowledge distillation step for taking two complementary models trained on generated intermediate samples as 'teachers' to develop a superior 'student' in a multi-teacher distillation manner. These two optimization steps work in an alternating way and reinforce each other to give rise to DDB with strong adaptation power. Extensive experiments on adaptive segmentation tasks with different settings demonstrate that our DDB significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Code is available at https://github.com/xiaoachen98/DDB.git.
abstract_zh: 在无监督域适应（UDA）中，从源域直接适应目标域通常会出现显着差异并导致对齐不足。因此，许多 UDA 作品试图通过各种中间空间（称为域桥接（DB））逐渐而柔和地消除域间隙。然而，对于诸如域自适应语义分割（DASS）之类的密集预测任务，现有的解决方案大多依赖于粗略的风格迁移，并且如何优雅地桥接域仍处于探索之中。在这项工作中，我们利用数据混合来为 DASS 建立一个有意的域桥接（DDB），通过它，源域和目标域的联合分布在中间空间中对齐并相互作用。 DDB 的核心在于双路径域桥接步骤，用于使用粗略和精细数据混合技术生成两个中间域，以及跨路径知识蒸馏步骤，用于将在生成的中间样本上训练的两个互补模型作为“教师”，以多教师蒸馏方式培养优秀的“学生”。这两个优化步骤交替进行，相互促进，使得DDB具有很强的适应能力。对不同设置的自适应分割任务进行的大量实验表明，我们的 DDB 显着优于最先进的方法。代码可在 https://github.com/xiaoachen98/DDB.git 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于领域自适应语义分割的精心设计的领域桥接方法（DDB），以解决源域和目标域之间的分布差异问题。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督领域自适应方法在密集预测任务（如领域自适应语义分割）中效果有限，主要依赖粗糙的风格迁移，难以优雅地弥合领域差异。
AI.method: 通过数据混合构建中间领域，采用双路径领域桥接生成粗粒度和细粒度中间域，并结合跨路径知识蒸馏，利用两个互补模型作为教师模型指导学生模型训练。
AI.result: 在多种设置的自适应分割任务中，DDB显著优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: DDB通过交替优化的双路径桥接与知识蒸馏机制，有效提升了领域自适应语义分割的性能。

conclusion: DDB通过交替优化的双路径桥接与知识蒸馏机制，有效提升了领域自适应语义分割的性能。
search_text: Deliberated Domain Bridging for Domain Adaptive Semantic Segmentation 用于域自适应语义分割的故意域桥接 In unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA), directly adapting from the source to the target domain usually suffers significant discrepancies and leads to insufficient alignment. Thus, many UDA works attempt to vanish the domain gap gradually and softly via various intermediate spaces, dubbed domain bridging (DB). However, for dense prediction tasks such as domain adaptive semantic segmentation (DASS), existing solutions have mostly relied on rough style transfer and how to elegantly bridge domains is still under-explored. In this work, we resort to data mixing to establish a deliberated domain bridging (DDB) for DASS, through which the joint distributions of source and target domains are aligned and interacted with each in the intermediate space. At the heart of DDB lies a dual-path domain bridging step for generating two intermediate domains using the coarse-wise and the fine-wise data mixing techniques, alongside a cross-path knowledge distillation step for taking two complementary models trained on generated intermediate samples as 'teachers' to develop a superior 'student' in a multi-teacher distillation manner. These two optimization steps work in an alternating way and reinforce each other to give rise to DDB with strong adaptation power. Extensive experiments on adaptive segmentation tasks with different settings demonstrate that our DDB significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Code is available at https://github.com/xiaoachen98/DDB.git. 在无监督域适应（UDA）中，从源域直接适应目标域通常会出现显着差异并导致对齐不足。因此，许多 UDA 作品试图通过各种中间空间（称为域桥接（DB））逐渐而柔和地消除域间隙。然而，对于诸如域自适应语义分割（DASS）之类的密集预测任务，现有的解决方案大多依赖于粗略的风格迁移，并且如何优雅地桥接域仍处于探索之中。在这项工作中，我们利用数据混合来为 DASS 建立一个有意的域桥接（DDB），通过它，源域和目标域的联合分布在中间空间中对齐并相互作用。 DDB 的核心在于双路径域桥接步骤，用于使用粗略和精细数据混合技术生成两个中间域，以及跨路径知识蒸馏步骤，用于将在生成的中间样本上训练的两个互补模型作为“教师”，以多教师蒸馏方式培养优秀的“学生”。这两个优化步骤交替进行，相互促进，使得DDB具有很强的适应能力。对不同设置的自适应分割任务进行的大量实验表明，我们的 DDB 显着优于最先进的方法。代码可在 https://github.com/xiaoachen98/DDB.git 获取。 本文提出了一种用于领域自适应语义分割的精心设计的领域桥接方法（DDB），以解决源域和目标域之间的分布差异问题。 Lin Chen,Zhixiang Wei,Xin Jin,Huaian Chen,Miao Zheng,Kai Chen,Yi Jin cs.CV

authors_text: Guohang Yan,Jiahao Pi,Chengjie Wang,Xinyu Cai,Yikang Li
title: An Extrinsic Calibration Method between LiDAR and GNSS/INS for Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 用于自动驾驶的 LiDAR 和 GNSS/INS 之间的外在校准方法
abstract: Accurate and reliable sensor calibration is critical for fusing LiDAR and inertial measurements in autonomous driving. This paper proposes a novel three-stage extrinsic calibration method between LiDAR and GNSS/INS for autonomous driving. The first stage can quickly calibrate the extrinsic parameters between the sensors through point cloud surface features so that the extrinsic can be narrowed from a large initial error to a small error range in little time. The second stage can further calibrate the extrinsic parameters based on LiDAR-mapping space occupancy while removing motion distortion. In the final stage, the z-axis errors caused by the plane motion of the autonomous vehicle are corrected, and an accurate extrinsic parameter is finally obtained. Specifically, This method utilizes the planar features in the environment, making it possible to quickly carry out calibration. Experimental results on real-world data sets demonstrate the reliability and accuracy of our method. The codes are open-sourced on the Github website. The code link is https://github.com/OpenCalib/LiDAR2INS.
summary: Accurate and reliable sensor calibration is critical for fusing LiDAR and inertial measurements in autonomous driving. This paper proposes a novel three-stage extrinsic calibration method between LiDAR and GNSS/INS for autonomous driving. The first stage can quickly calibrate the extrinsic parameters between the sensors through point cloud surface features so that the extrinsic can be narrowed from a large initial error to a small error range in little time. The second stage can further calibrate the extrinsic parameters based on LiDAR-mapping space occupancy while removing motion distortion. In the final stage, the z-axis errors caused by the plane motion of the autonomous vehicle are corrected, and an accurate extrinsic parameter is finally obtained. Specifically, This method utilizes the planar features in the environment, making it possible to quickly carry out calibration. Experimental results on real-world data sets demonstrate the reliability and accuracy of our method. The codes are open-sourced on the Github website. The code link is https://github.com/OpenCalib/LiDAR2INS.
abstract_zh: 准确可靠的传感器校准对于自动驾驶中融合激光雷达和惯性测量至关重要。本文提出了一种用于自动驾驶的激光雷达和 GNSS/INS 之间的新型三阶段外部校准方法。第一阶段可以通过点云表面特征快速校准传感器之间的外在参数，从而在短时间内将外在参数从较大的初始误差缩小到较小的误差范围。第二级可以根据激光雷达映射空间占用进一步校准外部参数，同时消除运动失真。最后阶段，对自动驾驶汽车平面运动引起的z轴误差进行修正，最终获得准确的外参数。具体来说，该方法利用环境中的平面特征，使得快速进行校准成为可能。真实世界数据集的实验结果证明了我们方法的可靠性和准确性。这些代码在 Github 网站上开源。代码链接为https://github.com/OpenCalib/LiDAR2INS。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于自动驾驶的LiDAR与GNSS/INS传感器的三阶段外参标定方法。
AI.motivation: 传感器融合需要高精度的外参标定，传统方法存在初始误差大、校准效率低的问题。
AI.method: 分三阶段实现：1) 基于点云表面特征快速缩小初始误差范围；2) 利用LiDAR映射空间占用关系消除运动畸变；3) 修正平面运动引起的z轴误差。
AI.result: 真实数据集验证了方法的可靠性与准确性，代码已开源至GitHub。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过环境平面特征实现快速标定，为自动驾驶传感器融合提供了有效解决方案。

ai_content.conclusion: 该方法通过环境平面特征实现快速标定，为自动驾驶传感器融合提供了有效解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种用于自动驾驶的LiDAR与GNSS/INS传感器的三阶段外参标定方法。
motivation: 传感器融合需要高精度的外参标定，传统方法存在初始误差大、校准效率低的问题。
method: 分三阶段实现：1) 基于点云表面特征快速缩小初始误差范围；2) 利用LiDAR映射空间占用关系消除运动畸变；3) 修正平面运动引起的z轴误差。
result: 真实数据集验证了方法的可靠性与准确性，代码已开源至GitHub。
conclusion: 该方法通过环境平面特征实现快速标定，为自动驾驶传感器融合提供了有效解决方案。
search_text: An Extrinsic Calibration Method between LiDAR and GNSS/INS for Autonomous Driving 用于自动驾驶的 LiDAR 和 GNSS/INS 之间的外在校准方法 Accurate and reliable sensor calibration is critical for fusing LiDAR and inertial measurements in autonomous driving. This paper proposes a novel three-stage extrinsic calibration method between LiDAR and GNSS/INS for autonomous driving. The first stage can quickly calibrate the extrinsic parameters between the sensors through point cloud surface features so that the extrinsic can be narrowed from a large initial error to a small error range in little time. The second stage can further calibrate the extrinsic parameters based on LiDAR-mapping space occupancy while removing motion distortion. In the final stage, the z-axis errors caused by the plane motion of the autonomous vehicle are corrected, and an accurate extrinsic parameter is finally obtained. Specifically, This method utilizes the planar features in the environment, making it possible to quickly carry out calibration. Experimental results on real-world data sets demonstrate the reliability and accuracy of our method. The codes are open-sourced on the Github website. The code link is https://github.com/OpenCalib/LiDAR2INS. 准确可靠的传感器校准对于自动驾驶中融合激光雷达和惯性测量至关重要。本文提出了一种用于自动驾驶的激光雷达和 GNSS/INS 之间的新型三阶段外部校准方法。第一阶段可以通过点云表面特征快速校准传感器之间的外在参数，从而在短时间内将外在参数从较大的初始误差缩小到较小的误差范围。第二级可以根据激光雷达映射空间占用进一步校准外部参数，同时消除运动失真。最后阶段，对自动驾驶汽车平面运动引起的z轴误差进行修正，最终获得准确的外参数。具体来说，该方法利用环境中的平面特征，使得快速进行校准成为可能。真实世界数据集的实验结果证明了我们方法的可靠性和准确性。这些代码在 Github 网站上开源。代码链接为https://github.com/OpenCalib/LiDAR2INS。 本文提出一种用于自动驾驶的LiDAR与GNSS/INS传感器的三阶段外参标定方法。 Guohang Yan,Jiahao Pi,Chengjie Wang,Xinyu Cai,Yikang Li cs.RO
